mapper.select: SELECT SERVICE_ID, WORK_CD, PROC_CD, TASK_CD, BOND_YN, BOND_DC, CARID_NO, REG_GB, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(REG_NO) AS REG_NO, BIZ_NO, OWNER_NM, OWNER_BRANCH_ID, POST_NO, BUBJUNG_CD, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(ADDRESS) AS ADDRESS, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(ADDRESS_DT) AS ADDRESS_DT, BASE_BRANCH_ID, BASE_POST_NO, BASE_BUBJUNG_CD, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(BASE_ADDRESS) AS BASE_ADDRESS, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(BASE_ADDRESS_DT) AS BASE_ADDRESS_DT, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(TEL_NO) AS TEL_NO, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(MPHONE_NO) AS MPHONE_NO, PRDTC_CD, REQ_CAR_YN, REQ_CAR_NO, CAR_NO, TO_CHAR(IMSIGV_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS IMSIGV_DT, IMSIGV_CD, IMSINUM_YN, IMSINUM_DT, NUMPLATE_GB, DISTR_YN, DISTR_CD, INSURER_NM, PAY_GB, PAY_NM, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(PAY_HP_NO) AS PAY_HP_NO, PAY_ME, PAY_ST, PAY_DT, TOTAL_AMT, VBANK_CD, VBANK_NO, T_VBANK_GB, T_VBANK_ID, BD_SERVICE_ID, NTAX_TRGET_CD, INS_USER, INS_DATE, UPD_USER, UPD_DATE, RATIO_NO, MADE_DT, MADE_YY, CAR_CC, GETIN_NO, COLOR_GB, CAR_NM, CAR_KD, CAR_KD_CD, FM_NM, FUEL_CD, BUY_AMT, NTAX_WHO, NTAX_TRGET_GR_CD, NTAX_APPLC_CD, STAMP_GB, INJI_NO, PREREG_AMT, NEWCAR_REG_DT, BOND_AMT, BOND_BANK_CD, BOND_BANK_NO, BOND_LINK_YN, STANDARD_AMT, MEMO_TX, RT_BANK_CD, RT_ACC_NO, RT_ACC_NM, RT_AMT, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(CARP_ADDRESS) AS CARP_ADDRESS, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(CARP_ADDRESS_DT) AS CARP_ADDRESS_DT, CARP_POST_NO, GOVT_TX, CAR_US, SPMNNO, LAST_DT, VH_TY_CD, INSURER_CD, TO_CHAR(INSURER_SDT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS INSURER_SDT, TO_CHAR(INSURER_EDT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS INSURER_EDT, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(ADDR_INFO) AS ADDR_INFO, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(ADDR_INFO2) AS ADDR_INFO2, LOW_POLLUTION_YN, CONTRACTOR_NM, TO_CHAR(CONTRACTOR_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONTRACTOR_DT FROM TR_NEWCAR WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}
